# Support

## Documentation

- [Trinity Documentation](https://ghashtag.github.io/trinity/docs/) — full API reference, research reports, and benchmarks
- [README](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity#readme) — quick start and installation guide
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity/blob/main/CLAUDE.md) — development workflow and architecture reference

## Getting Help

- **Bug reports** — [Open an issue](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) with reproduction steps
- **Feature requests** — [Open an issue](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) describing your use case
- **Questions** — [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity/discussions) for general questions and community support

## Contributing

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for development setup and contribution guidelines.

## Security

To report security vulnerabilities, see [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/gHashTag/trinity/blob/main/SECURITY.md).
